---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new idea or enhancement

labels: ["type:feature"]
---

## Problem statement

What gap or pain point are you trying to solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change or feature you want to add.

## Alternatives considered

List alternatives and tradeoffs.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Clear success criteria
- [ ] Minimal reproducible test/validation plan
